caption: The video features a man speaking at an event called "theCUBE LIVE at BigDataSV 2015," held at the Fairmont Hotel in San Jose, CA. He is dressed in a dark suit jacket over a light-colored shirt and appears to be engaged in a discussion or presentation. The background prominently displays logos for "BigDataSV 2015" and "theCUBE," indicating the context of the event. The man gestures with his hands as he speaks, suggesting he is explaining or emphasizing points related to the topic of big data. The setting is professional, with a focus on technology and data analytics, as evidenced by the branding and sponsorship by InfoObjects.
